title: geiseleria glandulosa
intro: Geiseleria glandulosa, also known as the glandular geiseleria, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Geiseleria glandulosa include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
